birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Cranes breeding in the Sanjiang Plain and the Xingkai Lake region migrate south along the Ussuri River, passing the Tumen River and the northern east coast of the Korean Peninsula (e.g., Kimyeo), and winter in the Han River basin near Panmunjom
